description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a single sloped shed roof finished in matte black. The exterior walls are clad in vertical black paneling, giving it a contemporary and streamlined appearance. The front facade includes large floor-to-ceiling glass doors and windows, allowing ample natural light into the interior and providing a clear view of the living space. A small wooden deck extends from the front, with a few stones placed as decorative elements near the entrance. The side of the bungalow has a single window and a visible house number, while the rear and opposite side are solid and unadorned. The interior appears to be open-plan, with visible furnishings and a human figure for scale.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a sloped black roof, vertical black paneling, and large glass doors opening onto a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped black roof and solid black-paneled wall, with part of the wooden deck visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the sloped roof and a plain black-paneled wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Side view with a window, house number, and stacked stones, plus a partial view of the wooden deck.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the large glass doors and windows, wooden deck, and interior furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front glass doors and a single side window
